mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE grp_tree AS (
SELECT g.grp_no, g.grp_parent, g.grp_name, g.bg_file_nm, g.view_type, CAST(g.grp_name AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS path_name FROM cm_topo_group g WHERE g.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
AND g.grp_no = #{grpNo}
AND g.grp_parent = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT cg.grp_no, cg.grp_parent, cg.grp_name, cg.bg_file_nm, cg.view_type, CAST(gt.path_name || ' > ' || cg.grp_name AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS path_name FROM grp_tree gt INNER JOIN cm_topo_group cg ON cg.grp_parent = gt.grp_no AND cg.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) WHERE cg.grp_no != cg.grp_parent ) SELECT gt.grp_no, gt.grp_parent, pg.grp_name AS grp_parent_nm, gt.grp_name, gt.bg_file_nm, gt.view_type, gt.path_name, COALESCE(evt.evt_level_cnt1, 0) AS evt_level_cnt1, COALESCE(evt.evt_level_cnt2, 0) AS evt_level_cnt2, COALESCE(evt.evt_level_cnt3, 0) AS evt_level_cnt3, COALESCE(evt.evt_level_cnt4, 0) AS evt_level_cnt4, COALESCE(evt.evt_level_cnt5, 0) AS evt_level_cnt5 FROM grp_tree gt LEFT JOIN cm_topo_group pg ON gt.grp_parent = pg.grp_no AND pg.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ti.grp_no, SUM(CASE WHEN e.evt_level = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evt_level_cnt1, SUM(CASE WHEN e.evt_level = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evt_level_cnt2, SUM(CASE WHEN e.evt_level = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evt_level_cnt3, SUM(CASE WHEN e.evt_level = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evt_level_cnt4, SUM(CASE WHEN e.evt_level = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evt_level_cnt5 FROM cm_topo_item ti INNER JOIN cm_evt e ON ti.mng_no = e.mng_no WHERE ti.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND e.evt_level > 0 AND e.evt_end_date IS NULL GROUP BY ti.grp_no ) evt ON gt.grp_no = evt.grp_no ORDER BY gt.grp_name

SELECT ti.grp_no, ti.item_no, r.rack_no, r.rack_name, r.rack_type, COALESCE(r.x_point, 0) AS x_point, COALESCE(r.y_point, 0) AS y_point, COALESCE(r.rack_u, 42) AS rack_u, COALESCE(r.width, '600') AS width, COALESCE(r.height, '2000') AS height, COALESCE(r.yyyymmdd, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS yyyymmdd, r.rack_desc, r.rack_ip, r.rack_port, COALESCE(r.model, '') AS model, COALESCE(r.vendor, '') AS vendor, COALESCE(r.evt_level, 0) AS evt_level FROM cm_topo_item ti INNER JOIN s_cm_rack r ON ti.mng_no = r.rack_no WHERE ti.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND ti.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND ti.dev_kind1 = 'RACK' ORDER BY r.rack_name

SELECT rc.rack_no, rc.rack_section, rc.slot_no, COALESCE(rc.slot_u, 1) AS slot_u, dg.grp_name, COALESCE(rc.mng_no, 0) AS mng_no, COALESCE(d.dev_name, '') AS dev_name, COALESCE(d.dev_ip, '') AS dev_ip, COALESCE(rc.dev_kind1, d.dev_kind1, '') AS dev_kind1, COALESCE(d.dev_kind2, '') AS dev_kind2, COALESCE(d.vendor, '') AS vendor, COALESCE(d.model, '') AS model, COALESCE(rc.img_name, '') AS img_name, COALESCE(rc.slot_kind, 'SVR') AS slot_kind, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e WHERE e.mng_no = rc.mng_no AND e.evt_level > 0 AND e.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' ) AS evt_level FROM s_cm_rack_conf rc LEFT JOIN cm_dev10 d ON rc.mng_no = d.mng_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT g.grp_no, g.grp_name, dd.mng_no FROM cm_dev10 dd INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group g ON dd.grp_no = g.grp_no ) dg ON rc.mng_no = dg.mng_no WHERE rc.rack_no = #{rackNo} ORDER BY rc.rack_section, rc.slot_no

SELECT s.rack_no, r.rack_name, 0 AS grp_no, '' AS grp_name, s.fms_seq_no, s.mng_no, s.sensor_id, s.sensor_name, s.sensor_kind, COALESCE(s.x_point, 0) AS x_point, COALESCE(s.y_point, 0) AS y_point, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e WHERE e.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e.evt_level > 0 AND e.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' ) AS evt_level, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_name FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e2.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e2 WHERE e2.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e2.evt_level > 0 AND e2.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), 'Normal' ) AS evt_level_str, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_opt1 FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e3.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e3 WHERE e3.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e3.evt_level > 0 AND e3.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), '#00AA00' ) AS evt_level_color, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(p.sensor_value AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_fms_perf p WHERE p.mng_no = s.mng_no AND p.sensor_id = s.sensor_id AND p.perf_date >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY p.perf_date DESC LIMIT 1), '' ) AS sensor_value FROM cm_fms_sensor s INNER JOIN s_cm_rack r ON s.rack_no = r.rack_no WHERE s.rack_no = #{rackNo} ORDER BY s.sensor_id

SELECT 0 AS rack_no, '' AS rack_name, ti.grp_no, g.grp_name, s.fms_seq_no, s.mng_no, s.sensor_id, s.sensor_name, s.sensor_kind, COALESCE(s.x_point, 0) AS x_point, COALESCE(s.y_point, 0) AS y_point, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e WHERE e.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e.evt_level > 0 AND e.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' ) AS evt_level, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_name FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e2.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e2 WHERE e2.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e2.evt_level > 0 AND e2.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), 'Normal' ) AS evt_level_str, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_opt1 FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e3.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e3 WHERE e3.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e3.evt_level > 0 AND e3.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), '#00AA00' ) AS evt_level_color, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(p.sensor_value AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_fms_perf p WHERE p.mng_no = s.mng_no AND p.sensor_id = s.sensor_id AND p.perf_date >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY p.perf_date DESC LIMIT 1), '' ) AS sensor_value FROM cm_fms_sensor s INNER JOIN cm_topo_item ti ON s.mng_no = ti.mng_no INNER JOIN cm_topo_group g ON ti.grp_no = g.grp_no AND g.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) WHERE ti.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND ti.grp_no = #{grpNo} ORDER BY s.sensor_id

SELECT s.rack_no, r.rack_name, 0 AS grp_no, '' AS grp_name, s.fms_seq_no, s.mng_no, s.sensor_id, s.sensor_name, s.sensor_kind, COALESCE(s.x_point, 0) AS x_point, COALESCE(s.y_point, 0) AS y_point, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e WHERE e.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e.evt_level > 0 AND e.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' ) AS evt_level, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_name FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e2.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e2 WHERE e2.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e2.evt_level > 0 AND e2.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), 'Normal' ) AS evt_level_str, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_opt1 FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e3.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e3 WHERE e3.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e3.evt_level > 0 AND e3.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), '#00AA00' ) AS evt_level_color, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(p.sensor_value AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_fms_perf p WHERE p.mng_no = s.mng_no AND p.sensor_id = s.sensor_id AND p.perf_date >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY p.perf_date DESC LIMIT 1), '' ) AS sensor_value FROM cm_fms_sensor s INNER JOIN s_cm_rack r ON s.rack_no = r.rack_no WHERE s.rack_no IN ( SELECT r2.rack_no FROM cm_topo_item ti2 INNER JOIN s_cm_rack r2 ON ti2.mng_no = r2.rack_no WHERE ti2.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND ti2.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND ti2.dev_kind1 = 'RACK' )
UNION ALL
SELECT 0 AS rack_no, '' AS rack_name, ti.grp_no, g.grp_name, s.fms_seq_no, s.mng_no, s.sensor_id, s.sensor_name, s.sensor_kind, COALESCE(s.x_point, 0) AS x_point, COALESCE(s.y_point, 0) AS y_point, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e WHERE e.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e.evt_level > 0 AND e.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' ) AS evt_level, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_name FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e2.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e2 WHERE e2.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e2.evt_level > 0 AND e2.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), 'Normal' ) AS evt_level_str, COALESCE( (SELECT vc.val_opt1 FROM cm_val_code vc WHERE vc.val_kind = 'EVT_LEVEL' AND vc.val_code = COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(MAX(e3.evt_level) AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_evt e3 WHERE e3.mng_no = s.mng_no AND e3.evt_level > 0 AND e3.evt_end_date IS NULL), '0' )), '#00AA00' ) AS evt_level_color, COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(p.sensor_value AS VARCHAR) FROM cm_fms_perf p WHERE p.mng_no = s.mng_no AND p.sensor_id = s.sensor_id AND p.perf_date >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY p.perf_date DESC LIMIT 1), '' ) AS sensor_value FROM cm_fms_sensor s INNER JOIN cm_topo_item ti ON s.mng_no = ti.mng_no INNER JOIN cm_topo_group g ON ti.grp_no = g.grp_no AND g.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) WHERE ti.user_id = (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND ti.grp_no = #{grpNo} ORDER BY sensor_id
